title: eremogone surculosa
intro: Eremogone surculosa, also known as Sticky Eremogone, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of the western United States. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Eremogone surculosa include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and antibacterial agent. Herbal preparations of Eremogone surculosa can be made by infusing the plant's leaves and stems in hot water or by using it as a tincture, and it is often used topically to treat minor cuts and scrapes.
